hero.subheadline: A fragrance is not worn. It is carried — the way light carries warmth long after the sun has turned.

about.title: Our Philosophy
about.paragraph1: Aériva was born from the belief that fragrance is not decoration — it is identity. Each composition is a quiet conversation between memory and intention, crafted in the heart of Europe.
about.paragraph2: We work with restraint, choosing fewer notes to say more. Our fragrances are not loud. They are present — lingering at the edges of perception, waiting to be noticed.
about.tagline: Crafted with intention. Worn with meaning.

fragrances.title: The Collection
fragrances.subtitle: Each fragrance tells a story that words alone cannot.

lumiere.name: Lumière Dorée
lumiere.description: A sunlit whisper of bergamot, white tea, and sandalwood. Morning light captured in glass.

velours.name: Velours de Nuit
velours.description: Deep, velvety darkness. Oud, black amber, and a trace of dried rose. For those who speak in silence.

brume.name: Brume Éternelle
brume.description: The quiet after rain. Iris, wet stone, and soft musk. A fragrance that remembers.

sales.title: Sales Options
sales.subtitle: Whether you are an individual or a business, we have the right option for you.

retail.title: Retail
retail.description: Purchase directly from our collection. Each fragrance is delivered in our signature packaging, ready to be experienced.

wholesale.title: Wholesale
wholesale.description: Partner with Aériva for your boutique, hotel, or retail space. Competitive pricing with dedicated account support.

bespoke.title: Enterprise
bespoke.description: Custom fragrance programs for corporations, hospitality brands, and large-scale retail partners. Tailored solutions at scale.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you. We will be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: Born in Belgium, Aériva crafts fragrances with poetic restraint and intentional elegance. Each composition is a quiet conversation between memory and intention.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Visit us at one of our sales points across Europe.

brussels.name: Aériva Brussels — Flagship
brussels.address: Rue du Fossé aux Loups 34, 1000 Brussels
